mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO SURVEY_QUESTIONS (SVNUM, QUESTIONS_ID, QUESTIONS_TEXT) VALUES (SURVEY_SEQ.CURRVAL, #{item.QUESTIONS_ID}, #{item.QUESTIONS_TEXT})
SELECT * FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT SVNUM, CODE, SUB, SDATE FROM SURVEY WHERE SVNUM = (SELECT MAX(SVNUM) FROM SURVEY)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SURVEY_RESULT VALUES (#{SVNUM}, #{MNUM}, #{CODE} ) INSERT INTO SURVEY_RESULT VALUES () INSERT INTO SURVEY_RESULT VALUES () INSERT INTO SURVEY_RESULT VALUES () INSERT INTO SURVEY_RESULT VALUES ()
